From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Dalmatian Italian art director

| Gastone Medin | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Born | (1905-07-06)6 July 1905  [Split](/wiki/Split,_Croatia "Split, Croatia"), [Austro-Hungarian Empire](/wiki/Austro-Hungarian_Empire "Austro-Hungarian Empire") |
| Died | 1973(1973-00-00) (aged 67–68)  [Rome](/wiki/Rome "Rome"), [Lazio](/wiki/Lazio "Lazio"), [Italy](/wiki/Italy "Italy") |
| Occupation | Art director |
| Years active | 1929–1961 (film) |

**Gastone Medin** (1905–1973) was a [Dalmatian Italian](/wiki/Dalmatian_Italian "Dalmatian Italian") [art director](/wiki/Art_director "Art director").[[1]](#cite_note-1) He worked on more than a hundred and fifty films during his career.
